text:
In the first scene, I feel a quiet sense of curiosity mixed with slight nervousness. The low hum of people gathering, talking quietly, and focusing intently creates an atmosphere of anticipation. The utilitarian surroundings and purposeful movements around me make me feel like a part of an unfolding event, perhaps a lecture or a seminar. 

In the second space, surrounded by vivid colors and large, bold text, my mood shifts to one of intrigue and wonder. The statement about confusion and perception on the screen resonates with me, inviting a moment of introspection. The environment feels playful yet thoughtful, encouraging me to question how easily reality can be distorted, even by my own hand. Surrounded by creativity and inquiry, I feel inspired to reflect on my experiences and perceptions.
